prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your career change forward
items: Complete a comprehensive skills inventory by listing all your professional abilities, achievements, and experiences from the past 5 years
Schedule and conduct three informational interviews with professionals working in careers that interest you
Take two career assessment tests from different providers and compare the results to identify consistent themes
